summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Iteration 1 fixes for Benjamin Kurtz Academy PLR landing page. All 17 tested features pass. Hero V3 design, scroll-controlled CTA, sticky About image, reduced section spacing, enlarged testimonial quotes - all working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Client testimonial cards still show placeholder text '[ Testimonial-Text — wird ergänzt ]' and '[ Weiteres Testimonial — wird ergänzt ]'
ui_bugs.priority: LOW - expected placeholder content, needs real testimonials

action_items: Replace placeholder testimonial texts with real client quotes in plr-de.js
Vimeo video privacy settings (known issue from iteration_1) - allow embedding on the domain
critical_code_review_comments: All Iteration 1 fixes verified: HeroV3Section, Header scroll-CTA, SectionWrapper reduced padding, AboutSection sticky + text-lg, TestimonialsSection text-xl/2xl - all correct
BookingSection CTA uses data-testid='booking-cta-button' (not 'cta-button-primary') - this is an <a> tag, not CtaButton component - minor inconsistency but functional
Benjamin Kurtz photo now loading from R2 bucket (was broken in iteration_1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 1 fixes verified working: (1) HeroV3Section: 'DEINE SEELE.' small/muted, 'ERINNERT SICH.' dominant large, video right-shifted, no primary CTA in hero, only podcast link. (2) Scroll CTA: opacity-0/pointer-events-none initially, opacity-100 after 300px scroll - confirmed via class checks. (3) SectionWrapper py-16 md:py-20 (reduced from py-24 md:py-32). (4) AboutSection: md:sticky md:top-28 on photo column, text-lg paragraphs. (5) TestimonialsSection: all blockquotes use text-xl md:text-2xl. (6) CaseStudies accordion: max-h-0 -> max-h-[1400px] on click, 3-column content visible. (7) R2 photo loading. (8) Footer: 8 links. Known remaining: Vimeo privacy error, placeholder client testimonials.

features_tested.hero_v3_headline_hierarchy: PASS - DEINE SEELE small/muted (text-brand-deep/60), ERINNERT SICH dominant large (clamp 3.8-9.5rem), subtitle left-aligned
features_tested.scroll_cta_hidden_initial: PASS - parent has 'opacity-0 pointer-events-none' on load
features_tested.scroll_cta_visible_after_300px: PASS - parent transitions to 'opacity-100' after scrollY > 300
features_tested.scroll_indicator: PASS - ChevronDown at absolute bottom-8 right-10/16 with animation
features_tested.hero_podcast_link: PASS - data-testid='hero-podcast-link', scrolls to #podcast (scrollY went to 1597)
features_tested.header_logo: PASS - R2 image loading, fallback text available
features_tested.whatis_skeptic_toggle: PASS - toggle opens, Ian Stevenson/Brian Weiss content visible
features_tested.case_studies_accordion: PASS - max-h-0 before click, max-h-[1400px] clientHeight 281px after click
features_tested.testimonials_quote_size: PASS - all blockquotes have text-xl md:text-2xl class
features_tested.section_padding: PASS - py-16 md:py-20 on all sections
